final:
Core apps: _example/Hello World (example scaffold), agent/Coding Agent (terminal/web coding agent), app-analytics/App Analytics (usage and vault health), app-gen/App Generator (creates apps/plugins), assistant/Assistant (AI chat with vault and voice), billing/Billing (LLM/image cost tracking), calendar/Calendar (unified schedule view), capture/Quick Capture (fast inbox capture), dictionary/Dictionary (word lookup and SRS), focus/Focus (Pomodoro timer), geocode/Geocode (address ↔ coordinates), gesture/Gesture (hand-gesture demo), git/Git (version control for notes/projects), hands-free/Hands-Free (voice control via gestures), hello-world/Hello World (minimal reference app), journal/Journal (daily journaling), link/Link Manager (note connections), model-bench/Model Bench (compare LLMs), music-studio/Music Studio (song production hub), note/Note Manager (create/read/update notes), projects/Projects (project portfolio), providers/Providers (manage model providers), publish/Publish (static-site publishing), quotes/Quotes (daily quote), reactor/Reactor (event metabolism), release/Release (packaging), reports/Reports (professional docs), routing/Routing (multi-stop route planning), run/Command Runner (execute shell commands), search/Search (vault search with AI answers), settings/Settings (system config), system-log/System Log (system activity feed), task/Task Manager (tasks across notes), test-app/Test App (test app), tests/Tests (in-daemon test runner), tmpl/Templates (note templates), voice-assistant/Aura (conversational voice assistant), weather/Weather (forecast/history), web-analytics/Web Analytics (privacy-first page analytics).

Personal apps: 3d-studio/3D Studio (render 3D scenes), ai-queue/AI Queue (task classification/instruction queue), asset-register/Asset Register (asset lifecycle tracking), bookmarks/Bookmarks (read-later queue), briefing/Briefing (daily command center), cable/Cable (cable engineering), calculator/Calculator, career/Career Development (skills and gaps), cer-hosting/CER Hosting Capacity (DER hosting analysis), contacts/Contacts (people tracker), divination/Divination (I Ching log), drone-flight/Drone Flight Planner (inspection route planning), drone-images/Drone Images (drone defect classifier), english/English (English practice dashboard), expense/Expense (expense tracking), fiction-engine/Fiction Engine (fiction writing hub), finance/Finance (financial command center), github-connector/GitHub Connector (sync GitHub work items), gpts/GPTs (custom personas), grid-analytics/Grid Analytics (demo hub over grid apps), grid-twin/Grid Twin (physics scenarios), healing/Healing (wellness tracking), hub/Dashboard (life dashboard), inspection-queue/Inspection Queue (field-work prioritization), integrity/Integrity Audit (system self-check), items/Items (physical item tracking), jobs/Jobs (career command center), lessons/Lessons (English lessons), media/Media (books/movies/music), meditation/Stillness (meditation tracking), news-center/News Center (news aggregator), nutrition/Nutrition (meal tracking), places/Places (location notes), plan-scenarios/Plan Scenarios (planning options), podcast/Podcast (dual-host podcast generation), pointcloud/Point Cloud (LiDAR-to-notes), quickref/Quick Ref (reference cards), recipes/Recipes (recipe collection), reflect/Reflect (self-observation layer), reminders/Reminders (time-triggered reminders), scan-map/Scan Map (scan viewer), shadowing/Shadowing (pronunciation practice), speaking/Speaking (conversation practice), staff/Staff (autonomous agents), studio/Studio (AI image generation), timeline/Timeline (life events), tracker/Tracker (life goals), tts/Voice Studio (text-to-speech), vegetation-intrusion/Vegetation Intrusion (tree-growth projection), voice-review/Voice Review (speaking analysis).
